homepage.title: Dronetag | Drone Detection & Remote ID Solutions
homepage.description: End-to-end drone detection, identification & compliance solutions. Secure airspace with real-time tracking, Remote ID transmitters & fleet coordination.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Dronetag | Drone Detection & Remote ID Solutions
Shop
Open App
Open App
Menu
Close
We Are Making Drones
Digitally Visible
We offer end-to-end drone detection & identification solutions. Our technology brings control, compliance, and situational awareness to any airspace.
See our solutions
The Sky Is Getting Crowded.
We’re Here to Make Sense of It.
With 10+ millions active drones worldwide and exponential market growth, the skies are becoming increasingly complex. Whether you are detecting unauthorized drones, coordinating your fleet, or ensuring compliance with global standards, our transmitters and receivers, integrated into a user-friendly digital platform, help you take back control - instantly and reliably.
The Dronetag
Ecosystem
Our hardware and software brings safety, compliance, and control to the drone world. Our solutions scale with you, from individual pilots to large-scale industrial and defense operations.
Drone & Pilot Detection
Creating a protective digital layer around any sensitive area. Our stationary and wearable receivers provide real-time drone detection, enabling you to secure critical infrastructure and maintain complete situational awareness.
See Receivers
Remote ID Compliance
Make any drone compliant with global regulations. We offer the world's top-selling identification modules for pilots and the smallest, most efficient OEM solutions for drone manufacturers.
See Transmitters
Visualisation Platform
Take command with the Dronetag App, the central hub of our ecosystem. Manage devices, inspect airspace, and analyze flight data from a single, intuitive interface on mobile and web.
See Platform
Built for Every Layer
of the Drone Ecosystem
We tailor our solutions to your specific needs, making digitally advanced skies an overnight possibility.
Law Enforcement
Detect, identify, and respond to uncooperative flights
First Responders
Operate safely and maintain aerial awareness during missions
Critical Infrastructure
Secure your skies and protect high-value assets
Defense Sector
Integrate tactical drone tracking into complex environments
Event Coordination & Security
Maintain the airspace clear and monitored during public gatherings
UAV Manufacturers
Ensure your drones meet all Remote ID requirements
Software Integrators
Connect Dronetag with your existing UTM or C-UAS software
Professional Pilots & Drone Builders
Stay compliant and understand what’s flying near you
Need a Tailored Solution?
Whatever your mission, we’ll help you build the right mix of detection, tracking, and complience tools.
Request a custom offer
Field-Proven. Market-Leading.
Why Industry Leaders
Choose Dronetag
About us
We Set
the Global Standards
Dronetag founders co-authored the technical white paper for the Remote ID protocol. We work directly with authorities in the EU, the US, and Asia to shape the future of drone regulation.
Seamless
Integration
Our hardware and software are designed to work in perfect harmony. With over 15 UTM integration partners and a
